items.title: Mafia boss behind notorious murders in Italy dies behind bars in Milan
items.dek: "Nitto" Santapaola was believed to have masterminded the murder of one of Italy's most famous anti-mafia prosecutors in 1992.
items.body: "Nitto" Santapaola was believed to have masterminded the murder of one of Italy's most famous anti-mafia prosecutors in 1992.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Zelensky fears Trump's Iran war could hurt Ukraine
items.dek: Ukraine fears what soaring oil prices and a shortage in air defences could mean for them.
items.body: Ukraine fears what soaring oil prices and a shortage in air defences could mean for them.

items.title: Mexican drug lord 'El Mencho' buried in golden coffin
items.dek: Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes led the feared Jalisco New Generation Cartel until his death during a firefight in February.
items.body: Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes led the feared Jalisco New Generation Cartel until his death during a firefight in February.
